title: Bug Zapper, 4200V Insect Pest Fly Killer, 15W Electric Mosquito Zapper for Indoor and Outdoor, Waterproof Mosquito Killer for Flying Insect Control Lamp, Outdoor & Indoor Mosquito Killer Lamp(1,5m)
bullet_points: 2-IN-1 Outdoor Mosquito Killer-- 2024 Upgraded Designed with an LED white light on the bottom, Seenlast bug zapper can not only effectively repels pesky insects but also illuminate the darkness at night, ideal for both indoor and outdoor use, especially perfect for outdoor activities such as dinners, party, BBQ, camping and more.

Efficient Electric Fly Trap -- Mosquito zapper effectively controls insects over 1500 sq ft, it uses a replaceable 15W bulb to emit a 365nm purple light wave and microthermal effect that attracts insects effectively, then electrocutes them by 4200V high-voltage grid, can efficiently kill off mosquito, gnats, Aedes, flies, moths and other flying insects.

IPX6 Waterproof Powerful -- Designed with IPX6 grade waterproof, Electric fly zapper is resistant to harsh weather conditions, ensuring longevity. With a hanging hook, it can be used in various locations, including home, balcony, patio, garden, porch, courtyard, farm, office, swimming pool, garage, pergola and more.

Lightweight, Compact, Portable --The seenlast electric fly killer, weighing just 0.9 kg and measuring L5.9"* W5.9" H12", is not only compact for indoor space saving but also portable to carry outdoors. Comes with a 5ft long power cord, convenient for outdoor activities.

Safe Solution For Family -- Registered with the EPA, mosquito killer lamp indoor kills bugs by physical methods, no pesticides or attractants, completely safe for your family, adopts fireproof ABS material and 0.27" frame intervals to protect your family and pets from accidental contact with the inner grid.Ideal for mosquito repellent inside and outside.

100% Satisfactory Service -- The light bulb is a consumable item which needes to be replaced regularly, simply search for B0GF6C1KQ4 to make a purchase. If you receive a damaged or wrong bug zapper, please contact us for a replacement. Meet any usage problem, you are welcome to contact us.
